did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Files concerning her retirement and role as an professor emeritus.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Mary K. Bloetjes received a Ph.D. from Cornell University in 1953. She served as head of the Department of Institution Management in the College of Home Economics at Cornell from 1955 to 1969 and a a professor in the Department of Human Nutrition and Food in the College of Human Ecology from 1969 until her retirement in 1970.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Files concerning her retirement and role as an professor emeritus.

controlaccess.head: Names:
controlaccess.persname: New York State College of Human Ecology --Faculty.
